display_text: Enchanted Quiver, Tier 0: Non-purchasable item providing a Certain Strike passive ability. Empowers your next attack after 4 seconds of inactivity to deal +250 magical damage and never miss (True Strike). Grants ranged attackers +350 bonus range for the empowered attack. Ideal for heroes who weave in and out of combat to maximize bonus damage. Stats: CD: 4s (internal), Bonus Damage: 250 magical, Bonus Range (Ranged): 350.
